name: google_play_scraper
title: Google Play Scraper
description: Search public Google Play app results and return normalized app IDs, titles, developers, summaries, icons, ratings, review labels, store URLs, and monetization badges.

seo.title: Google Play Scraper Tool for App Search Metadata
seo.description: Search Google Play app results with Better Fetch and return app IDs, titles, developers, summaries, icons, ratings, review labels, store URLs, and monetization badges.
seo.intro: Google Play Scraper gives agents a focused way to inspect public Google Play app search results. Provide a keyword query and the tool fetches Google Play's app search page, extracts the visible result cards, and returns normalized app IDs, titles, developers, summaries, icons, ratings, review labels, store URLs, and monetization badges.

useCases.title: App market research
useCases.description: Search a keyword and capture competing Android apps with visible ratings, developers, summaries, and Google Play URLs.

useCases.title: ASO discovery
useCases.description: Collect app IDs and result-card copy before deciding which app detail pages or reviews deserve deeper extraction.

useCases.title: Agent briefs
useCases.description: Give an agent structured Google Play search context for a product category, brand, or feature area.

faqs.question: Does Google Play Scraper extract reviews?
faqs.answer: No. Version 0.1 returns app search result cards only. Reviews and full app detail pages should be added as separate validated tools or future slices.

faqs.question: Can I localize results?
faqs.answer: Yes. The tool supports Google Play language and country parameters, such as en-US with US or en-AU with AU.

faqs.question: Does it require a Google API key?
faqs.answer: No. The tool reads public Google Play result pages through Better Fetch and does not use account-specific Google credentials.

language.description: Google Play hl parameter, such as en-US or de-DE.

country.description: Google Play gl parameter, such as US, AU, GB, or DE.

apps.description: Public Google Play app result cards

contains_ads.description: Whether the card says contains ads

in_app_purchases.description: Whether the card says in-app purchases
